data.title: Gold Emerges as Key Competitor to US Dollar Amid BRICS Strategy
data.description: Morgan Stanley has identified gold as a primary contender against the US dollar, as BRICS nations intensify efforts to lessen their dependence on USD reserves. According to NS3.AI, the bank underscores the substantial rise in gold accumulation by BRICS countries, noting a more than 30% increase over the past five years. This move is part of a broader strategy to diversify away from assets denominated in US dollars. The ongoing trade tensions and evolving global alliances are accelerating the shift towards a multipolar financial system.

data.title: Nansen Unveils AI-Driven On-Chain Trading Platform
data.description: Nansen has introduced a new AI-powered on-chain trading platform designed to enhance analytics and execution for traders. According to NS3.AI, the platform aims to improve the delivery of insights by integrating advanced technology with trading processes. CEO Alex Svanevik highlights the role of AI as a supportive tool that enhances human decision-making rather than replacing it. He notes that while AI can process extensive on-chain data, it lacks the human elements of conviction and accountability. Svanevik emphasizes the importance of employing diverse strategies and ongoing testing in crypto analysis, underscoring that the ultimate responsibility and risk management lie with human traders.

data.title: xStocks Stock Tokens Achieve $3 Billion in On-Chain Transfer Volume
data.description:
The on-chain transfer volume of xStocks stock tokens has exceeded $3 billion, marking a significant milestone in the digital asset market. According to NS3.AI, decentralized exchange (DEX) trading volume for these tokens has surpassed $500 million, highlighting their increasing popularity among investors. The number of holders has grown to over 57,000, reflecting a broadening base of interest and engagement.

Additionally, the cumulative trading volume across centralized exchanges remains substantial, further indicating the expanding adoption and liquidity of xStocks stock tokens. This growth underscores the evolving landscape of digital assets and their integration into mainstream financial systems.

data.title: BitGo goes public: Crypto custodian reaches $2.1 billion valuation
data.description:
BitGo IPO: The crypto custodian goes public on the NYSE at a $2. 1 billion valuation. All details on the custody specialist's stock market debut. The article BitGo goes public: Crypto custodian reaches $2. 1 billion valuation was first published on Crypto Valley Journal.

data.title: Data Shows Gold And Bitcoin Work Better Together
data.description:
For years, gold investors and Bitcoin (BTC) believers have argued over which asset is superior, one side calling Bitcoin “digital gold,” the other seeing it as a speculative bubble. However, the data tells a very different story: gold and BTC aren’t rivals but teammates. com
source: https://www.techgaged.com/data-shows-gold-and-bitcoin-work-better-together/

data.title: Chainlink Acquires Atlas to Enhance Blockchain Infrastructure
data.description: On January 22, Chainlink announced the acquisition of Atlas, an on-chain order flow infrastructure. According to BlockBeats, Chainlink plans to integrate Atlas's order flow technology into its SVR (Verifiable Revenue Recovery) solution. This strategic move aims to accelerate the expansion of SVR across various blockchain ecosystems and enhance revenue for DeFi protocols.

data.title: ZBD Secures $40 Million to Revolutionize In-Game Payment Solutions
data.description: ZBD, a cryptocurrency startup established in 2019, has successfully raised $40 million to enhance payment systems for in-game purchases and subscriptions. According to NS3.AI, the company is focused on developing innovative solutions to streamline the payment process for gamers. The recent funding round is intended to bolster ZBD's development initiatives and facilitate its expansion into new markets.

data.title: Trump Warns Europe Against Selling U.S. Assets
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has cautioned Europe about potential severe retaliatory actions if it opts to sell U.S. assets, including government bonds and securities. According to NS3.AI, this warning has sparked apprehension regarding rising tensions between the United States and Europe. The geopolitical risks associated with this situation may have implications for global financial markets, including the cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: Coinbase establishes independent advisory committee on quantum computing and blockchain
data.description: According to an official announcement from Coinbase, the company has established an independent advisory committee on quantum computing and blockchain. Composed of experts including Scott Aaronson, Dan Boneh, Justin Drake, Sreeram Kannan, Yehuda Lindell, and Dahlia Malkhi, the committee aims to assess the impact of quantum computing on the blockchain ecosystem and provide independent guidance. Its responsibilities include publishing position papers assessing quantum risks, providing security advice to developers, and responding in real-time to major breakthroughs in quantum computing. In addition, Coinbase simultaneously disclosed its post-quantum security roadmap, including updates to Bitcoin address handling, its internal key management system, and advancements in support for post-quantum signature schemes such as ML-DSA in secure multi-party computation systems.

data.title: U.S. Economy Surpasses Expectations with 4.4% Growth in Q3
data.description: The U.S. economy grew at an annualized rate of 4.4% in the third quarter, surpassing analysts' predictions of 4.3%. According to NS3.AI, this preliminary GDP estimate may be revised in future reports. Economic growth figures are typically released in three stages: advance, preliminary, and final.

data.title: Hanwha Financial Partners with Liberty City Ventures and Xangle at Davos Forum
data.description:
Hanwha Financial has signed memorandums of understanding with Web3 venture firm Liberty City Ventures (LCV) and digital asset data infrastructure company Xangle at the World Economic Forum in Davos. According to Foresight News, Hanwha Life Insurance will collaborate with LCV to jointly invest in global fintech companies and expand the digital financial ecosystem. Hanwha Investment & Securities will work with Xangle to collaborate on blockchain digital asset data and research.

During the forum, Hanwha Financial hosted the 'Hanwha Financial Fireside Chat,' where discussions on financial innovation challenges took place with LCV's founding partner Emil Woods, managing partner Murtaza Akbar, and Xangle's co-CEO Junwoo Kim. LCV focuses on Web3, tokenized assets, and financial infrastructure, while Xangle provides enterprise-grade solutions, on-chain data analysis, and research services for financial institutions and the Web3 ecosystem.

data.title: The cultural industry RWA project LOVEVoyage was listed on RWAX, reaching a market value of $3 million within 10 minutes of its launch.
data.description: According to RWAX market and on-chain data, LOVEVoyage ($LOVE), a content-based RWA project under the live-action romance travel IP "Heartbeat Romance," completed its initial trading on RWAX tonight, with a price increase of approximately 52,614.667% within about 10 minutes of listing. It currently ranks first in RWAX's 24-hour trading volume and has since migrated to Pancake. With this listing on RWAX, LOVEVoyage will map a portion of the revenue rights from future seasons of "Heartbeat Romance's" live-action travel romance content to the RWAX platform, integrating it with consumption and governance scenarios such as casting voting, storyline branches, and offline events. This allows fans and on-chain users to participate in IP development and share potential value under the same asset structure. The project team revealed that more voting, support, content unlocking, and offline benefits will be gradually opened up around $LOVE in the future. Specific mechanisms and data progress will be continuously disclosed through official channels and on-chain records.

data.title: U.S. Third Quarter PCE Price Index Falls Below Expectations
data.description: The U.S. third quarter Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) price index annualized quarterly rate has been reported at 2.8%, falling short of market expectations of 3.5%. According to ChainCatcher, this figure remains unchanged from the previous value.

data.title: Ubisoft stock hits multiple all-time lows after major restructuring and six game cancellations
data.description:
Ubisoft shares tanked 33% on Thursday morning right after the company revealed it was shutting down multiple studios, canceling six games, and doing a full company overhaul. The crash wasn’t all that sudden though. Ubisoft stock has been going down for years, ever since the Covid boom ended. Game delays piled up, and so did […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ubisoft-stock-hits-multiple-all-time-lows/

data.title: The final reading of the US core PCE price index for the third quarter was 2.9% annualized quarterly, in line with expectations and unchanged from the previous reading of 2.90%.
data.description: The final reading of the US core PCE price index for the third quarter was 2.9% annualized quarter-on-quarter, in line with expectations and unchanged from the previous reading of 2.90%. The final reading of the US real GDP growth rate for the third quarter was 4.4% annualized quarter-on-quarter, in line with expectations and the previous reading of 4.30%. The final reading of the US real personal consumption expenditure growth rate for the third quarter was 3.5% quarter-on-quarter, unchanged from the previous reading. Initial jobless claims in the US for the week ending January 17 were 200,000, lower than the expected 210,000 and the previous week's figure revised from 198,000 to 199,000. (Jinshi)

data.title: BitGo Holdings Debuts on NYSE Amid Digital Finance Expansion
data.description: BitGo Holdings made its public debut on January 22, listing on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker BTGO. According to NS3.AI, the company is renowned for providing secure, institutional-grade crypto custody and infrastructure services. With its new public status, BitGo aims to expand its presence in the rapidly evolving digital finance sector. Serving nearly 5,000 clients worldwide, BitGo offers a comprehensive suite of services ranging from custody to trading, highlighting the robust institutional demand for regulated crypto infrastructure.

data.title: U.S. Weekly Jobless Claims Slightly Below Expectations
data.description: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending January 17 reached 200,000, slightly below the anticipated 210,000. According to BlockBeats, the previous week's figure was revised from 198,000 to 199,000. This data provides insight into the current state of the U.S. labor market.

data.title: Stablecoin Market Cap Surpasses $311 Billion Amid Crypto Downturn
data.description: The stablecoin market cap has achieved a record high of over $311 billion, despite a general decline in the broader cryptocurrency market characterized by substantial liquidations. According to NS3.AI, Tether (USDT) and Circle's USDC maintain their dominance in stablecoin supply, while new players such as World Liberty Financial's USD1 stablecoin have contributed to the recent expansion. Regulatory uncertainty persists, with delays in the CLARITY Act and cautious market sentiment indicating low expectations for a swift altcoin recovery.
